reviews.comment:
Buena atención, pero la mercadería del buffet bastante mala calidad. Los sandwich y las ensaladas.. bastante malas en relación a otras YPF de la misma zona

(Translated by Google)
The service was good, but the buffet food was of pretty poor quality. The sandwiches and salads were quite bad compared to other YPF stations in the same area.

reviews.comment:
No diferencia de otros. A veces algunos empleados del shop te suelen ladrar pero otros se desviven para atenderte aunque en épocas de finde largo esta repleto de compradores.
Cundo se corta la luz no prenden El generador y te dejan a pata. Un bajón, pasa seguido.

(Translated by Google)
It's no different from other places. Sometimes some of the shop's employees are a bit rude, but others go out of their way to help you, even though it's packed with shoppers on long weekends. When the power goes out, they don't turn on the generator and leave you stranded. It's a real bummer; it happens often.
